subject: docs(audit): update project structure and fix tutorial terminology
body:
Added 6 missing files to CLAUDE.md project structure (BaseModal,
ErrorBoundary, MergeSection, SearchModeContent, ConnectModeContent,
messages.ts). Fixed TutorialModal steps that referenced "Conventions
page/tab" — it's a modal dialog accessed from the burger menu.

Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-quality-audit
Semver: patch
